description_long: This object is a shotgun with a robust, metallic barrel and a full stock, featuring a matte black finish on the barrel and a dark, possibly wooden or synthetic stock. The receiver and trigger guard are rendered in a metallic gold or brass color, providing a striking contrast to the darker elements. A scope is mounted on top of the barrel, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting. The lever-action mechanism is clearly visible beneath the receiver, indicating a classic lever-operated loading system. The trigger guard is elongated and rounded, seamlessly integrated with the lever for ergonomic operation. Subtle red accents are present on the stock and near the lever, adding a touch of visual detail.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a black barrel, gold receiver, full stock, and mounted scope, featuring red accent details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, gold receiver, lever-action mechanism, and mounted scope.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's width and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the lever and trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, moderate barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard integrated with the lever, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible
